channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: Trump Imposes 50% Tariffs on Canadian Goods as U.S.-Canada Trade Tensions Escalate
item.description:
President Donald Trump has imposed 50% tariffs on several Canadian imports, escalating trade tensions over disputes involving automobiles, alcohol, dairy products and market access
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/dailynews/trump-50-percent-tariffs-canada-autos-alcohol-cheese-trade-war-2026
